buy_intro_c1: Kugula Bitcoin koyamba kungaoneke kovuta, koma ndikosavuta kwambiri mukagawa m'masitepe.
buy_intro_c2: Gaidi iyi idzakutsogolerani mu njira yogula Bitcoin motetezeka ndi kuisunga mu chikwama chanu.
buy_step_1_description: Mayiko osiyanasiyana ali ndi njira zosiyanasiyana zogulira Bitcoin. Sankhani dziko lanu kuti muone njira zabwino kwa inu.
buy_step_2_description: Pali njira ziwiri zazikulu zogulira Bitcoin: kutumiza ndalama ku banki kapena ndalama. Iliyonse ili ndi phindu lake.
buy_method_bank_description: Kutumiza ndalama ku banki ndi njira yodziwika kwambiri yogulira Bitcoin. Ndi yachangu, yosavuta, ndipo nthawi zambiri ili ndi malipiro ochepa.
buy_method_cash_description: Kugula ndi ndalama kumapereka chinsinsi chambiri koma njira ndi zochepa ndipo zingafune kukumana ndi munthu kapena kugwiritsa ntchito Bitcoin ATM.
buy_step_3_description: Nayi njira zabwino kwambiri zogulira Bitcoin kwa dziko lanu ndi njira yanu yolipira:
buy_platform_strike_description: Strike ndi njira yachangu ndi yosavuta kwambiri yogulira Bitcoin ndi malipiro ochepa ndi kuthandizira kwa Lightning Network.
buy_platform_swan_description: Swan Bitcoin imapereka ntchito za Bitcoin yokha ndi kugula kwapang'ono kwapang'ono ndi zinthu zophunzitsa.
buy_platform_river_description: River imapereka kugula Bitcoin, kufukula, ndi kusunga ndi cholinga cha maphunziro ndi chitetezo.
buy_platform_coinsquare_description: Coinsquare ndi msika wa Bitcoin wa ku Canada wokhala ndi malamulo olimba ndi kuthandizira makasitomala.
buy_platform_kraken_description: Kraken ndi msika wa Bitcoin wokhazikika wokhala ndi mwayi wapamwamba wa malonda ndi chitetezo cholimba.
buy_platform_atm_description: Ma ATM a Bitcoin amakuthandizani kugula Bitcoin ndi ndalama nthawi yomweyo. Pezani wapafupi pogwiritsa ntchito Coin ATM Radar.
buy_platform_bisq_description: Bisq ndi msika wopanda anthu apakati wopakati pa anthu womwe umalola kugula Bitcoin mwachinsinsi popanda KYC.
buy_platform_relai_description: Relai ndi pulogalamu ya Bitcoin yokha ya ku Switzerland ndi chikwama chokusunga wekha, kugula mwachindunji, ndi malipiro ochepa kwa ogwiritsa ntchito ku Europe.
buy_step_4_c1: Mutagula Bitcoin, sitepe lofunika kwambiri ndi kuisamutsira ku chikwama chanu pomwe mumalamulira makiyi anu.
buy_step_4_c2: Kusiya Bitcoin pa exchange ndi chiwopsezo chifukwa simuli ndi Bitcoin kwenikweni - msikayo ndiye ali nayo.
buy_step_4_c3: Mukalamulira makiyi anu, muli ndi umwini weniweni wa Bitcoin yanu ndipo palibe amene angaitenge.
buy_step_4_c4: Phunzirani momwe mungasankhire chikwama cha Bitcoin choyenera:
buy_cta_wallets: Onani Gaidi Yathu ya Zikwama za Bitcoin
